  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "No expansion tank installed on closed water heating system",
    "System subject to excessive pressure buildup without thermal expansion control"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install a properly sized thermal expansion tank on the cold water supply line",
    "Verify that the system is not isolated by a check valve, backflow preventer, or pressure-reducing valve without provision for thermal expansion",
    "Set expansion tank pre-charge pressure to match incoming water supply pressure"
  ],
  "rationale": "A closed plumbing system without an expansion tank cannot accommodate the expanded water volume during heating, leading to pressure spikes that can cause T&P relief valve discharge, water hammer, or catastrophic tank failure. IPC 504 and IRC P2804 require thermal expansion control. Current condition is non-compliant and poses high risk of scalding and equipment damage.",
  "references": ["IPC 504", "IRC P2804"]
}
